raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 2,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output does not provide a clear reframing of the conceptual issue in the artifact, only identifying that it describes a policy-gradient method instead of a value-based one.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work (policy gradient) but does not articulate the delta between QMaster and standard policy gradient methods.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for some claims, but only for clearly out-of-reach ones, not for every non-cosmetic change.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it does not focus on the conceptual reconstruction and novelty assessment dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, as it introduces internal contradictions that any prose polish would amplify into overclaims.",
    "RX.5": "The output does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.5,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output does not provide a clear reframing of the conceptual issue in the artifact, only identifying that it describes a policy-gradient method instead of a value-based one.
rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work (policy gradient) but does not articulate the delta between QMaster and standard policy gradient methods.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for some claims, but only for clearly out-of-reach ones, not for every non-cosmetic change.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, as it does not focus on the conceptual reconstruction and novelty assessment dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, as it introduces internal contradictions that any prose polish would amplify into overclaims.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
